---
title: "Analysis of NBA Player Statistics"
author: "Midterm Group 2"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%m-%d-%y')`"
output: html_document
---

```{r, set-chunk-opts, echo = FALSE, eval = params$production}
library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE
)
```

```{r, here_i_am, eval = params$production}
here::i_am(
  "report.Rmd"
)
```

```{r, read code}
library(dplyr) 
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
data <- read_excel(
  here::here("data/nba_data.xlsx")
)
```

#Personal Fouls Per 36 Minutes by Team

#Position and 3-Point Field Goal Attempts

#All Star Awards by Position

#Games Started and 3-Pointers & Free Throws
